subtitle: Specialist knowledge developed over 35+ years of exclusive child support practice.

items.title: Assessment Reviews
items.description: Objections, change of assessment applications, income disputes, and Administrative Review Tribunal matters.

items.title: Agreements
items.description: Drafting and reviewing binding and limited child support agreements, including tax-effective structures and lump-sum arrangements.

items.title: Enforcement
items.description: Debt recovery through administrative and legal channels, including garnishee orders, DPOs, and overseas collection.

items.title: Overseas Matters
items.description: Cross-border child support collection, reciprocal country agreements, and international enforcement.

items.title: Tax & Child Support
items.description: The intersection of child support with Personal Services Income, trusts, salary sacrifice, and Adjusted Taxable Income.

items.title: Paternity
items.description: Parentage testing, presumption of parentage, court declarations, and their implications for child support liability.
